reasoning: The control requires tracking, documenting, and reporting incidents, which aligns with Kubernetes audit logging and network policy logging capabilities. Kubernetes audit logs can be configured to capture and retain necessary information for incident response. Admission controllers can be used to enforce policies that ensure incident reporting mechanisms are in place. Additionally, network policy logging can help track network-related incidents.
title: 3_6_2: 3.6.2 Track, document, and report incidents to designated officials and/or authorities both internal and external to the organization
